content: AVSpeechSynthesizer (AVFoundation) is the recommended macOS TTS API (NSSpeechSynthesizer is legacy/AppKit). Available on macOS 13+. The speak() method is non-blocking and returns immediately; completion is signaled via the AVSpeechSynthesizerDelegate protocol (speechSynthesizer(_:didFinish:)). No special entitlements are required for non-sandboxed apps; the app already holds the audio hardware (AVFoundation already used for recording). Menu-bar apps (LSUIElement) can speak without any permission dialog. Recommended usage: instantiate AVSpeechSynthesizer, create AVSpeechUtterance with the text, call synthesizer.speak(utterance). The synthesizer serializes utterances if you enqueue multiple.
